en.title: For Starlink Mini Cable Starlink POE Ethernet Cable to D 5.5*2.1 Male Connector Starlink Compatible Mini Cable
en.description_html:
Connector

Starlink MINI DC (5.5*2.1) *1, Standard Cat6 RJ45 *1, T568B wiring standard

Pin Configuration

Positive (Pin+): 1, 2, 3, 6; Negative (Pin-): 4, 5, 7, 8

Cable

CAT5E cable (26AWG), 8-core wire (4 red + 4 black), gray PVC outer sheath, male connector cable

pt-BR.description_html:
Conector

Starlink MINI DC (5.5*2.1) *1, Cat6 RJ45 padrão *1, padrão de cabeamento T568B

Configuração dos pinos

Positivo (Pin+): 1, 2, 3, 6; Negativo (Pin-): 4, 5, 7, 8

Cabo

Cabo CAT5E (26AWG), fio de 8 vias (4 vermelhos + 4 pretos), capa externa de PVC cinza, cabo com conector macho
